name: HMS Rowena (J 384)
events: 3 Nov 1944 HMS Vox (Lt. J.M. Michell, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Malta, with aircraft and HMS Rowena (Lt.Cdr. G.C. Hogart, DSC, RNR).
Later this day D/G trials were carried out. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
